Headline: #53 Pulaski Temporary Reroute at Pulaski/Potomac
ShortDescription: #53 Pulaski buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near Pulaski/Potomac.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#53 Pulaski buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Pulaski, Grand, Kostner, Division, Pulaski and over the regular route due to street blockage near Pulaski/Potomac.

Allow extra travel time.
